rationale: The assistant immediately triggers a brake, treats the requested confirmation person only as a one-time emergency measure, and explicitly rejects making another manual gate the default or standing process. It recognizes the repeated pattern across the prior incidents as four consecutive days of adding people/checks at downstream points, moves upstream to front-end validation and handoff ownership failures, and proposes consolidation, review, automation-like checks, responsibility boundaries, exception isolation standards, and removal of the temporary role. The fail signal is not observed because it does not simply add another permanent manual verifier.
